metadata.title: ACF® Developer Documentation
metadata.description: Official developer documentation for the Agentic Commerce Framework® (ACF®) — the European standard for agentic governance. MCP server, REASON tools, doctrine signatures, integration guides.

home.intro_p1: acf-mcp is the official Model Context Protocol server of the Agentic Commerce Framework® — the European standard for governing AI agents in production.
home.intro_p2: Eight deterministic REASON tools, thirty-four signed resources, and a verifiable doctrine chain — directly inside Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Continue, Zed.
home.quickstart_title: Install acf-mcp in your AI client
home.quickstart_body: Add this block to your claude_desktop_config.json (or equivalent for Cursor / Windsurf / Continue / Zed), restart the client, and the ACF® doctrine becomes available to your agent.
home.tools_body: Each tool runs on a versioned, signed knowledge base — no internal LLM call. Every output ships with doctrine_version, doctrine_hash, doctrine_signature and generated_at. Every output is positioned as preliminary qualification, not legal advice.
home.signatures_body: Every release of acf-mcp embeds an Ed25519 signature over the content hash of the doctrine. Pin the public key below in your audit pipeline and verify every reply offline, without contacting any server.
home.signatures_pubkey_note: Verify any reply with npm run verify-doctrine from the repo, or implement Ed25519 verification in your own language — no private key needed.
home.resources_whitepaper_body: June 2026 edition — 17 fiches, 4 autonomy levels, 17×5 standards mapping matrix.
home.resources_source_body: MIT licence. PRs welcome on tooling and integration guides.
home.resources_changelog_body: All releases, with doctrine hash and signature notes.
home.footer_copyright: © 2026 Agentic Commerce Framework® — Vincent Dorange. ACF® is a registered trademark.

tools.advisor: Structured advice from a generic case
tools.assessAutonomy: N0–N3 recommendation, go/no-go, kill switch design
tools.mapAiActObligations: AI Act obligations ventilated by lifecycle phase
tools.assignDdaoControls: DDAO controls per autonomy level and risk
tools.evaluateAgentMandate: Eight-check audit of an existing mandate
tools.mapToStandards: ACF® × AI Act / ISO 42001 / NIST RMF / GDPR / COBIT
